intended_use: The Caption Guidance software is intended to assist medical professionals in the acquisition of cardiac ultrasound images. The Caption Guidance software is an accessory to compatible general purpose d
intended_use_full: The Caption Guidance software is intended to assist medical professionals in the acquisition of cardiac ultrasound images. The Caption Guidance software is an accessory to compatible general purpose diagnostic ultrasound systems.
target_condition: Cardiac imaging assessment via transthoracic echocardiography
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; algorithm tested against clinically-acceptable image quality standards
other_metrics: Frame-level and clip-level Prescriptive Guidance prediction performance; Auto-Capture feature performance in recording clinically-acceptable images and clips; human factors summative testing with 16 users (7 without prior scanning experience, 9 with prior experience) found no use errors associated with critical tasks likely to lead to patient injury
